title: iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Subject Matter Expert in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd:
iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iDiscoveri Education Consulting Pvt Ltd!
